ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from 27th April to 3rd May, returning on 4th May. During this period I will have limited access to email. If you need immediate assistance, please reach out to my colleague, Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com), who will be covering for me.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe
Project Manager

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Zoom Meeting Invite Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Colleague,

We have detected a new scheduled meeting on your Zoom account that requires your immediate confirmation. Due to recent security updates, all meetings must be verified to ensure compliance with our IT policy.

Meeting Title: Quarterly Strategy Review
Scheduled Time: 15:30 UTC on 30th April
Meeting ID: 123-456-7890

To verify this meeting and secure your participation, please click the link below within the next 12 hours:
<URL>

Failure to verify may result in the meeting being cancelled and your account being temporarily suspended. If you believe this is a mistake, reply to this email with the subject line "Verification Request".

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
Zoom Security Team
